# PR Summary

## Agent Role

<!-- CEO, Product Lead, UI/UX Designer, Product Engineer, Flutter Developer, QA/Test Engineer, Code Reviewer, Release Engineer -->

## Feature

<!-- Link or path to docs/features/<feature-slug>/ -->

## Scope

<!-- What changed, and what is intentionally out of scope? -->

## Owned Files

<!-- Which files/modules did this PR own? -->

## Test Evidence

<!-- Commands, manual checks, screenshots, or golden references. -->

## Risk Notes

<!-- Known risks, tradeoffs, or follow-ups. -->

## Release Notes

<!-- User-visible changes, if any. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] I used a Conventional Commit-style title or commit message.
- [ ] I updated docs, handoffs, or status files when project state changed.
- [ ] I ran the relevant checks or explained why they were not run.
- [ ] I confirmed the contribution follows `CONTRIBUTING.md`.
- [ ] I did not include secrets, credentials, private data, or unlicensed assets.
